name: java_fix_run
description: Repair a broken Java personal-income-tax calculator, detect the Java version, and produce outputs for given salary inputs. Decodes the program's own embedded (base64) tax brackets and threshold and applies the documented formula, cross-checking against compiling/running the fixed Java. Returns the java version line followed by the per-input results, comma-separated. Use for Java source fix-and-run tax tasks.
